scenes.scene_summary:
- Acts as a direct hook for users feeling stuck due to their English skills.
- Highlights the core Supernova value proposition: 10 mins of daily AI practice without tedious grammar.
- Drives immediate action with a gentle but firm time-bound CTA.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: क्या आप भी ENGLISH बोलने में अटकते हैं? [Do you also hesitate while speaking English?] NO BORING TEXTBOOKS. NO GRAMMAR. रोज़ सिर्फ 10 MINS SUPERNOVA AI TUTOR के साथ PRACTICE करें. [Practice for just 10 mins daily with Supernova AI Tutor.] NEW BATCH STARTS MONDAY!
